feature: APP_BASE_URL for Distribution Hub Content Delivery
summary: Tested APP_BASE_URL feature for Distribution Hub. The backend correctly uses APP_BASE_URL env var (set to https://creator-hub-700.preview.emergentagent.com) to construct public content URLs. All 10 backend tests passed (adapters endpoint, distribution creation, batch progress, delivery history, export packages). Frontend verified with all 7 tabs working correctly.

backend_api_tests.details: Returns app_base_url='https://creator-hub-700.preview.emergentagent.com', all 10 platform adapters (youtube, twitter_x, tiktok, soundcloud, vimeo, bluesky, discord, telegram, instagram, facebook), and message about content served from app URL
Creates deliveries with source_url set to APP_BASE_URL
Response includes live_adapters list with 10 platforms
Returns total, delivered, failed, delivering, queued, preparing, export_ready, progress_pct, is_complete
Non-existent batch returns zero counts with is_complete=true
Export package includes source_of_truth with APP_BASE_URL value

frontend_tests.details: Hub Dashboard, Content Library, Distribute, Templates, Delivery Tracking, Rights & Metadata, Platform Connections
All, Queued, Preparing, Delivering, Delivered, Export Ready, Failed
export_ready filter shows 35 items, all filter shows 43 items

frontend_tests.test: Distribute tab has template quick select

used_in_files: distribution_hub_service.py - create_delivery() uses APP_BASE_URL for source_url

critical_code_review_comments: platform_adapters.py get_app_base_url() properly reads env var with fallback to FRONTEND_URL
delivery_engine.py _resolve_public_url() correctly prepends APP_BASE_URL to relative file paths
All 10 platform adapters (YouTube, Twitter/X, TikTok, SoundCloud, Vimeo, Bluesky, Discord, Telegram, Instagram, Facebook) use get_public_file_url() which resolves to APP_BASE_URL
Distribution service create_delivery() sets source_url from APP_BASE_URL environment variable
seed_data_creation: Created test content (TEST_APP_BASE_URL_Track, TEST_URL_VERIFY_*, TEST_BATCH_PROGRESS_*, TEST_ADAPTERS_LIST_*, TEST_EXPORT_PKG_*) during backend testing. These are cleaned up after tests.

mocked_api.description: Platform adapters make real API calls but gracefully fall back to export_ready when no credentials are stored for the user. This is intentional behavior - users need to connect their platform accounts to enable auto-push delivery.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Distribution Hub at /distribution-hub has 120 platforms across 15 categories. The 10 platform adapters (YouTube, Twitter/X, TikTok, SoundCloud, Vimeo, Bluesky, Discord, Telegram, Instagram, Facebook) use APP_BASE_URL for content delivery. New deliveries have source_url set to APP_BASE_URL (https://creator-hub-700.preview.emergentagent.com). Export packages have source_of_truth field with same URL. The delivery engine processes deliveries in background and falls back to export_ready status when no platform credentials are saved.
